query:
SELECT id, code, name FROM sites WHERE status = 'active' LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, email, name FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%@centre3.com' OR email LIKE '%@aws.com' OR email LIKE '%@google.com' LIMIT 30;
